NPU System

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x51c00000
Size:
0x199004
Source:
scpu.rdl

Description

NPU System at NPU_SYS_BASE_ADDR. Contains several modules: NPU_MODULE_STRIDE=0x1000. appears to have 10 E31 or E21 cores.

Contents

Offset Identifier Name
0x000000 pec_s PEC S register space
0x000004 - -
0x001000 pec_d PEC D register space
0x001004 - -
0x112000 rdma_s RDMA S register space
0x112004 - -
0x113000 rdma_d RDMA D register space
0x113004 - -

0x128004 - -
0x129000 rdma_wrapper0_d RDMA Wrapper D register space
0x129004 - -

0x130004 - -

0x131004 - -

0x132004 - -
0x133000 pre_drp_wr0_d Pre-DRP WR0 D
0x133004 - -

0x13A004 - -

0x13C004 - -
0x13D000 post_drp_pdp_d Post-DRP PDP D
0x13D004 - -

0x1801E8 - -

0x181004 - -

0x1881D4 - -

0x1891D4 - -

0x190004 - -

0x191004 - -
